list.title: Products
list.subtitle: products in your catalog.

empty.title: No products found
empty.description: Add a new product or change your filters.

list.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this product?
list.deleteError: Could not delete. Please try again.

form.createSubtitle: Create a new product to share on Facebook.

title.label: Product name
title.hint: 3-100 characters. This is what shows on Facebook.

shortDescription.label: Short description
shortDescription.hint: Optional — appears as the first line of your Facebook post.

description.label: Full description
description.placeholder: Detailed product description: fabric, size, color options, etc.

stock.label: Stock quantity
stock.hint: If zero, status auto-flips to Out of stock.

status.label: Status
status.hint: Draft means it won't be published yet.

images.label: Product images
images.formats: JPG, PNG or WebP — up to 5MB

errors.titleTooShort: Name must be at least 3 characters.
errors.stockInvalid: Stock must be a valid number.
errors.imageInvalidType: Only JPG, PNG or WebP allowed.

form.errorGeneric: Could not save. Please try again.

categoryNew.title: New category
categoryNew.description: Add a new category to organize your products.
categoryNew.errorDuplicate: A category with this name already exists.
